caption: A screen recording captures a video call featuring a man in the upper right corner and a presentation slide on the left. The man has short hair and is wearing a dark shirt. The presentation slide is titled "06R Commodification" and includes a header stating, "Factory farming products can be considered as commodities in which economic efficiency is of paramount importance." Below the text is a complex conceptual map with green arrows connecting various terms, such as "Industrial Farming," "Commodification," and "Industrial Feed Production." A "Legend" is visible in the bottom left corner of the slide. Across the sequence, the man remains in his video feed, and the presentation content stays static. The only change is a slight shift in the browser window's focus or active tab, as indicated by small changes in the browser's top menu and the cursor's position.
